mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM app_admin_account_role WHERE account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY role_id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.role_key, r.role_name, r.permissions_json, r.enabled, r.built_in, r.sort_order, r.remark, r.created_by, r.updated_by, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM app_admin_account_role ar JOIN app_admin_role r ON r.id = ar.role_id WHERE ar.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.role_key AS roleKey, r.role_name AS roleName, r.enabled, r.built_in AS builtIn FROM app_admin_account_role ar JOIN app_admin_role r ON r.id = ar.role_id WHERE ar.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_admin_account_role ar JOIN app_admin_role r ON r.id = ar.role_id JOIN app_admin_account a ON a.id = ar.account_id WHERE r.role_key = #{roleKey} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.enabled = TRUE
